---
title: "Facial Recognition with Principal Component Analysis"
subtitle: "Using PCA to identify famous faces (Eigen Face)"
author: "Nigel Gebodh"
categories: [ML, Computer Vision, Image Recognition, PCA, SVD, Scikit-Learn]
date: "2022-01-01"
# reference-location: margin
back-to-top-navigation: false
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<iframe 
    src="https://nbviewer.org/github/ngebodh/MachineLearning/blob/master/SVM/EigenFaces_PCA.ipynb"
	frameborder="0"
    style="position:  relative; 
    top: 0%; 
    left: 0; 
    width: 100%; 
    height: 100%;"
    allowfullscreen>
</iframe>
```
